Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Emoticons / Emoticons

Emoticons

Overview

As of May 26th 2026, there are 821[1] Emoticons In-Game
“
Express yourself!
”
— In-Game Description

Emoticons are Cosmetic Items introduced in Season 2. They can be used in Battle Royale, Save the World, Creative and Fortnite Festival.

Additional features available for Emoticons

Additional features available for Emoticons[]
Animated
  • Skeptical was the first animated Emoticon.
